description_long: This is a tall, ornate stone obelisk with a pointed, gabled top and a rectangular base. The front face features intricate carvings, including two sculpted figures holding an open book above a recessed inscription panel. The sides are relatively plain but include some vertical fluting and a sculpted face near the top. The rear is unadorned, showing only the smooth stone surface and the architectural lines of the structure. The base is broad and solid, with beveled edges and a slightly raised platform. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or memorial function, typical of Victorian-era monuments found in urban parks or cemeteries.
description: A tall, ornate stone obelisk with sculpted figures, an inscribed front panel, and a pointed gabled top, set on a broad rectangular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing vertical fluting and a sculpted face near the top, with the base and some decorative elements visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, smooth stone surface with the gabled top and broad base, lacking ornamentation.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the vertical structure and sculpted face detail.
description_view_3: Front view featuring two sculpted figures holding an open book above an inscribed panel, framed by ornate architectural details.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscribed panel on the front face beneath the sculpted figures, featuring text in a serif style. The language appears to be English, but the legibility is low due to image resolution.
attribute_ornamentation: Ornate carvings on the front include two sculpted figures holding an open book, decorative arches, and a sculpted face on the side near the top. The rest of the structure is mostly plain.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular with beveled edges and a slightly raised platform, constructed from the same stone as the obelisk. It is solid and unadorned except for its architectural lines.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a pointed, gabled structure with a steep triangular profile, matching the architectural style of the front ornamentation. No additional decorations are visible at the tip.
